productTitle: Mikrotik pigtail MMCX Male / RPSMA Female ACMMCXRPSMA
name: Mikrotik pigtail MMCX Male / RPSMA Female ACMMCXRPSMA
title: Mikrotik pigtail MMCX Male / RPSMA Female ACMMCXRPSMA

detailed_description.heading: MMCX to RPSMA Pigtail
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik MMCX Male / RPSMA Female Pigtail (ACMMCXRPSMA) is a compact RF adapter cable designed to expand wireless capabilities in compatible MikroTik devices. Specifically engineered for adding a second wireless interface to BaseBox2 or BaseBox5, this pigtail provides a reliable and secure connection between the internal MMCX radio connector and an external RPSMA antenna interface. The cable features an MMCX male connector on one end and an RPSMA female connector on the other, ensuring compatibility with standard external antennas that use reverse polarity SMA connectors. This configuration allows users to integrate additional antennas for improved signal coverage, dual-chain operation, or enhanced wireless performance in point-to-point and point-to-multipoint deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Performance
detailed_description.text: With a cable length of 260 mm, the pigtail offers sufficient flexibility for convenient routing inside the enclosure while maintaining optimal signal integrity. The compact length is ideal for minimizing insertion loss and reducing unnecessary cable slack inside BaseBox outdoor enclosures. Built for durability and long-term operation, the adapter is rated with an MTBF of approximately 100,000 hours at 25°C, ensuring dependable performance in professional networking environments. The robust construction supports stable RF transmission while maintaining consistent mechanical connection between internal and external components. The ACMMCXRPSMA is an essential accessory for network integrators seeking to enhance wireless functionality in MikroTik BaseBox installations. It enables seamless antenna expansion while preserving signal quality, making it a practical and reliable solution for advanced wireless configurations.
